text:
いやー、すっごいやりやすかったー！
流石は幻の三人目だね！
相性バツグンだね！

……私も、やりやすかったって
ところは否定しないけど……
パティちゃん、突っ込みすぎ。

この人と一緒だと、そういう風に
動けそうな気がするんだよねー。
一緒だと調子が良くなる感じ？

まあ、私も一人でフォローに回らずに
済むからすごく助かるけど……

アナタさえよければ、また行こうね！
それじゃ、今回はありがと！

Having you around sure made things easy!
That's what makes you a perfect third member
of our duo-turned-trio!

I won't deny having an extra set of hands was
helpful, but Pati, you need to learn to control
yourself out there.

Whenever we're out together I just feel like I
don't need to hold back anymore though, you
know? Like I can do anything.

At least with a third member around I don't
have to pick up your mess on my own...

You should come out with us again
some time if you want! Thanks again!
